B: Thank you, it saves me the trouble of going down.

standard: Phạt tiền rất nặng luôn đấy nhé !
A: The fines are very heavy!
B: The fine is very heavy, you know!
C: The fines are really severe, you know!

standard: Em gái chị phải xinh chứ.
A: Your sister must be pretty.
B: My younger sister must be beautiful.
C: Your younger sister must be pretty.

standard: Con gái nhà ai mà xinh gớm nhỉ
A: Whose daughter is that? She's so beautiful!
B: Whose daughter is this, she's so incredibly beautiful.
C: Whose daughter is so pretty!

standard: Bữa hôm trước thì ông ấy đi sửa xe ở Vĩnh Long
A: The day before yesterday he went to Vinh Long to get his car repaired.
B: The other day, he went to get his vehicle repaired in Vinh Long.
C: The other day, he went to repair a vehicle in Vĩnh Long.

standard: tao mua cho mày rồi mày chê.
A: I bought it for you, and you complained.
B: I bought it for you and you complained.
C: I bought it for you and you rejected it.

standard: Vậy tụi chết này toàn là bọn buôn người hả?
A: So, were all these dead people human traffickers?
B: So are these dead people all human traffickers?
C: So are all these dead people human traffickers?

standard: Cô xuống đi, em chở đi chơi.
A: Get out of here, I'll take you out for a ride.
B: Come down, I'll take you out.
C: Come on down, I'll take you out for some fun.

standard: Bảo trì túi áo túi quần ấy chứ tivi!
A: You should be maintaining your pockets, not your TV!
B: Maintain the pockets of the shirt and pants, not the TV!
C: Maintain the shirt pocket and pants pocket, not the TV!

standard: Tận Cao Bằng cơ mà chiều mùng 10 đi.
A: We're going all the way to Cao Bang, but we'll leave on the afternoon of the 10th.
B: It's all the way in Cao Bang, so let's go on the afternoon of the 10th.
C: All the way to Cao Bằng though, let's go on the afternoon of the 10th.

standard: làm một chuyến trung thu muộn không? Mai tôi về đây này.
A: How about a belated Mid-Autumn Festival trip? I'm coming back here tomorrow.
B: Want to go on a late Mid-Autumn trip? I'm coming back here tomorrow.
C: Want to make a late Mid-Autumn trip? I'm coming back here tomorrow.

standard: thôi để tết rồi về xem luôn cho đã
A: I'll just wait until Tet (Lunar New Year) to go home and watch it properly.
B: I'll just wait until Tet to go back and watch it all at once for full satisfaction.
C: Forget it, I'll just wait until Tet and go back home to see it (just to get it over with)

standard: Con này là con chụt không phải ngao đâu, ngao nó to lắm
A: This is a mussel, not a clam. Clams are much bigger.
B: This one is a clam, not a geoduck; geoducks are very large.
C: This is a chụt (small clam), not a ngao (large clam). Ngao are much bigger.

standard: Giống vậy anh à, nói vô lý vậy mà bạn nói được!
A: That's right, brother, how can you say something so illogical!
B: It's just like that, honey; I can't believe you could say something so irrational!
C: Just like that, anh, saying something so nonsensical and yet you could say it!

standard: Mấy cháu chạy xuống dưới ruộng làm gì?
A: What were those kids doing running down into the rice fields?
B: What are you kids doing down in the fields?
C: Why are you kids running down to the field?

standard: Làm thật mới lòi ra em bé đấy chứ. Giờ làm giả thôi em nhé.
A: The real baby is only revealed when you do the actual thing. Right now, let's just fake it, okay?
B: It was only when I did it for real that the baby was revealed. Now let's just fake it.
C: You have to do it for real before the baby shows up, you know. For now, just fake it, okay?

standard: Mấy người ngồi xem không ai buồn cười luôn hay nhỉ!
A: It's strange that none of the people watching found it funny!
B: None of the people watching are even laughing, how strange!
C: None of you sitting and watching even found it funny at all, huh!

standard: Tôi dân Nghệ An không sợ đâu đừng mà dọa, chất hết!
A: I'm from Nghe An, I'm not afraid, don't try to scare me, I'll take them all!
B: I'm from Nghe An, so I'm not afraid; don't try to threaten me, it's all top-notch!
C: I'm from Nghe An, I'm not afraid at all, don't even try to scare me, we're the best!

standard: nhìn ca nước trà đá đã thật ấy chứ. Cái bụng uống cỡ đó mới thỏa thích
A: That glass of iced tea looks really nice. A stomach that big would be truly satisfied.
B: That glass of iced tea looks so refreshing. Drinking that amount is the only way to truly satisfy my craving.
C: Look at that glass of iced tea, it's really something. Only my belly would need to drink that much to be truly satisfied.

standard: Màu mè làm gì được mấy bữa rồi lại thâm mắt.
A: What's the point of all the fancy colors? They only last a few days before you end up with dark circles under your eyes.
B: What's the point of all the fancy colors; after a few days, you'll just have dark circles under your eyes again.
C: What's the point of all that flashiness? A few days later, you'll still end up with dark circles under your eyes again.

standard: Không thấy tên anh đâu cả nhỉ?
A: I can't find his name anywhere.
B: I don't see your name anywhere, do I?
C: I don't see your name anywhere though?

standard: Chừa lại cho em với, năm ngoái đi muộn nên hết. Uống nước mía xong về.
A: Leave some for me, please. Last year I came late and it was all gone. I'll drink some sugarcane juice and then go home.
B: Save some for me; I went too late last year so it was all gone. I'll come back after drinking sugarcane juice.
C: Save some for me too. Last year I went late so it was sold out. I'll drink some sugarcane juice and then head home.

standard: Kệ mẹ nó.
A: Screw it.
B: Screw it.
C: Forget it.

standard: Sao mà lắm thành phần ngáo vậy nhỉ?
A: Why are there so many clueless people?
B: Why are there so many clueless people?
C: Why are there so many ridiculous people out there?

standard: Bữa nay không uống nữa đâu.
A: I'm not drinking anymore today.
B: I'm not drinking anymore today.
C: I'm not drinking anymore today.

standard: Bạn chọn chứ em có chọn đâu.
A: You chose it, I didn't.
B: You chose it; I didn't.
C: You're the one who chose, I didn't choose.

standard: Nước nôi gì mà đã nhiều.
A: There's already so much water.
B: Why is there so much water?
C: This is already too much.

standard: Sáng qua tôi mới chọc mấy chị môi trường. Vật xuống làm gì để giờ phải chổng mông đở lên.
A: Yesterday morning I teased the environmental ladies. Why did you throw it down only to have to lift it up with your butt sticking up in the air?
B: Yesterday morning, I just teased the sanitation workers. Why did I mess with them, and now I have to scramble to make things right.
C: Yesterday morning I just poked at some bees, and now I have to stick my butt up to catch them as they fall.

standard: Ủa, sao không nhảy lên xe phi đi nhỉ?
A: Hey, why don't we just jump in the car and drive away?
B: Wait, why not just jump on the bike and speed off?
C: Hey, why don't you just hop on the flying car and go?

standard: Đoạn này đẹp vậy, chỗ nào đây cậu?
A: This place is so beautiful, where exactly is this?
B: This part is so beautiful, where is this?
C: This part looks so beautiful, where is it?

standard: Địa chỉ ở đâu vậy bạn?
A: Where is the address?
B: Where is the address?
C: Where's the address?

standard: làm gì nhập số lượng lớn vậy
A: Why would you import such a large quantity?
B: Why are you importing such a large quantity?
C: Why wholesale ordering that much?

standard: Nếu như được lựa chọn nhà tôi thèm đâu nhập vô Vinh.
A: If I had the choice, I'd rather move to Vinh.
B: If I had a choice, I wouldn't want to move into Vinh.
C: If given the choice, my family really wants to move to Vinh.

standard: Vậy thì cũng gần mà.
A: Well, it's quite close then.
B: Then it's quite close.
C: Well, that's also close then.

standard: Sướng chưa mẹ mày nè?
A: Are you happy now, Mom?
B: Are you happy now, you motherfucker?
C: Feeling good, aren't you?

standard: Hẹn ngày tôi thết đãi ăn mừng điện thoại mới nhé.
A: Let's set a date for me to treat you to a celebration for your new phone.
B: Let's set a date for me to treat you to a celebration for my new phone.
C: Let's set a date for me to treat you to celebrate my new phone, okay?

standard: Anh em đi trễ với nhau cho vui
A: Brothers, let's be late together for fun!
B: Let's be late together for fun.
C: We go late together just for fun

standard: Tết về đi chơi hết mình nhé.
A: Have a blast during Tet!
B: Go all out and have fun when Tet comes.
C: Tết is here, let's go out and have a blast!

standard: ông ấy mời mà tao không đi đấy chứ
A: He invited me, but I didn't go.
B: He invited me, but I'm not going.
C: He invited me but I didn't go, that's right.

standard: Quỳnh Nhi tối nay không lên đấy nơi á?
A: Quynh Nhi isn't going up there tonight, is she?
B: Is Quynh Nhi not going up there tonight?
C: Isn't Quỳnh Nhi coming there tonight?

standard: gái Nghệ An để cho tôi nữa, lấy hết thì tôi ế vợ ạ
A: Leave some girls from Nghe An for me too; if I take them all, I'll end up without a wife!
B: Leave some Nghe An girls for me; if you take them all, I'll end up without a wife.
C: Leave some Nghe An girls for me too. If you all take them, I'll never get married.

standard: Vinh chúng ta giờ đông vui nhỉ. Dịp nào cũng thấy có hội.
A: Vinh is so lively these days! There seems to be a festival at every occasion.
B: Our Vinh is so crowded and lively now. There seems to be a festival on every occasion.
C: Our Vinh is so lively now, huh. Every occasion, there's always a festival.

standard: Ở đoạn nào mà ngập dữ vậy?
A: Which area is experiencing such severe flooding?
B: Which section is so badly flooded?
C: Which part is flooded that badly?

standard: Lên mỗi 4 kg thôi, chẳng lẽ núp mình đến tết rồi ra gặp mọi người
A: I've only gained 4 kg, should I just hide until Tet (Lunar New Year) and then come out to meet everyone?
B: I only gained 4 kg, but should I just stay in hiding until Tet and then go see everyone?
C: I've only gained 4 kg, would I really have to hide until Tet and then come out to see everyone?

standard: Trong lành phải biết luôn, bữa nào ta dạo một bữa nhé?
A: The air is so fresh, let's go for a walk sometime, shall we?
B: It's so fresh, I have to say; shall we take a stroll there sometime?
C: Trong lành should know this by now too, when can we hang out together?

standard: Nói gì đâu nữa
A: What else is there to say?
B: There's nothing more to say.
C: What's there to say anymore

standard: Lo mà sửa đi, chứ bữa này tôi đi qua bất ngờ rồi.
A: Get it fixed, because I was surprised when I passed by today.
B: You'd better fix it, because I might drop by unexpectedly these days.
C: Go ahead and fix it, because I already passed by unexpectedly this time.

standard: Thấy bình thường vậy. Tao đi buổi tối đâu có ai.
A: It seems normal to me. I went out at night and there was nobody around.
B: It seems normal. When I go out at night, there is no one around.
C: It looks normal that way. I go in the evening, there's no one there.

standard: đoạn này năm nào mùa mưa bão đến cũng thất thủ
A: This section of the road is always flooded every year during the rainy season.
B: This section is overwhelmed every year when the storm and rainy season arrives.
C: This area gets flooded every year when the rainy season arrives.

standard: Rồi anh nào thiếu quà 20/10 cho nó đấy.
A: Then, whichever guy is still missing a gift for her on October 20th should be the one to pick her up.
B: So, which guy is missing a October 20th gift for her?
C: So which guys still haven't gotten her a gift for October 20th.

standard: Đồ ăn đây chứ đâu nữa.
A: The food is right here.
B: The food is right here.
C: The food's right here, where else would it be?

standard: Con này rượt tôi mấy lần rồi
A: This dog has chased me several times already.
B: This thing has chased me several times already.
C: This one has chased me several times already.
